Soofia Lateef

Philosophy PhD Candidate, University of California, Riverside

Research

Graduate Research Projects

  • Dissertation: Pessimism and Affect
  • Masters Thesis: Hope and Power-Seeking (accepted 2023)

Research Groups

Service

  • UC Riverside colloquia coordinator (2024–present)
  • Minorities and Philosophy chapter head for UC Riverside (2024–present)

Teaching
